notes:
RetinaTag 1.5.75 — Audit cleanup

Fixed:
- Watcher no longer dies silently on a poisoned mutex (poison-tolerant lock instead of .unwrap())
- NSFW auto-hide degrades gracefully if CLIP model is missing/OOM (bounds check on prompt embeddings)
- Delete-to-recycle: PowerShell failures are now logged instead of silently swallowed
- 'Fix health issues' also wipes orphan thumbnail + .rtenc files (no more silent disk growth)
- Scanner skips drive-root entries with empty filenames (used to land in DB and break XMP/rename)
- Cleanup delete modal no longer leaks document keydown listeners across sessions
- Face-popup polls have a 60s hard cap (no more forever-spinning timers if the popup races)
- Gallery shortcuts (p/n/g/s/r/f/x/[/]/0-5) no longer fire while typing in inputs (modifier chords still work)
- Vault lightbox releases the previous photo's base64 data URL on navigation (was ~5-20MB per photo)

From v1.5.74: P1 freeze + data-integrity fixes (recognize_all_faces spawn_blocking, watcher DB lock release, apply_rename transaction, vault decrypt error propagation, search-pipeline race guard, toast escape)
From v1.5.73: Vault P0 leaks + single-instance + XSS hardening
From v1.5.72: Large-library launch freeze fix

Windows: x86_64 NSIS installer.
macOS: Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3+).
